name: Spitzer Space Telescope
tagline: Infrared Great Observatory; 16 years of data
description: NASA’s infrared Great Observatory, in service 2003–2020. Designed for a five-year cryogenic mission but operated for sixteen, including a "warm mission" phase after its liquid-helium coolant was exhausted in 2009.
best_known_for: Infrared Great Observatory; 16 years of data
